package.name: wec_dyno_bringup
package.description:
Launch files, URDF description, and configuration for the ROS2 WEC HIL Dynamometer.
Provides two launch modes: dyno_single_machine.launch.py — all nodes on one machine (development/testing) dyno_distributed.launch.py — motor-side nodes only (two-machine HIL deployment)
Includes the two-motor URDF/Xacro, ros2_control controllers configuration, and FastDDS profile for optimised cross-machine communication.
